commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && echo FILE_FLAG=$(grep -E "^RESULTS_API_ENABLE_STATIC_FALLBACK=" .env | tail -n 1 || true) && echo CONTAINER_FLAG=$(docker compose exec -T results-api env | grep -E "^RESULTS_API_ENABLE_STATIC_FALLBACK=" | tail -n 1 || true) && docker compose exec -T results-api python - <<"PY"
from hermes.results_api.app import settings
print("SETTINGS_FLAG=" + str(settings.enable_static_results_fallback))
PY'
